name: trycua
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        trycua /

      cua  

    
      Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
summary: 该项目提供用于训练和评估能控制完整桌面（macOS、Linux、Windows）的AI代理的开源基础设施，包括沙箱、SDK和基准测试。值得关注是因为它填补了计算机使用代理标准化训练与评估工具的空白，对推动自主桌面操控AI的发展具有重要价值。

name: build-your-own-x
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        codecrafters-io /

      build-your-own-x  

    
      Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
summary: 该项目收录了从零构建各种流行技术（如数据库、编程语言、操作系统等）的教程合集，因其系统化的实践路径和高质量资源，非常适合想深入理解底层原理的开发者。

name: awesome-codex-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ComposioHQ /

      awesome-codex-skills  

    
      A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
summary: 该项目收集了实用的 Codex 技能，用于在 Codex CLI 和 API 上自动化工作流，因其精选的自动化方案能显著提升开发效率而值得关注。

name: posthog
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        PostHog /

      posthog  

    
      🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
summary: PostHog 是一个面向开发者的全栈产品分析平台，集成了产品分析、会话回放、错误追踪、功能开关和实验等功能。它值得关注是因为提供了开源、可自托管的替代方案，让团队能完全掌控用户数据，同时免去多个第三方工具的集成成本。

name: free-claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Alishahryar1 /

      free-claude-code  

    
      Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
summary: 该项目通过逆向工程让用户免费使用Claude Code的终端、VSCode扩展和Discord功能，无需付费订阅即可体验高级AI编程助手。

name: abhigyanpatwari
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        abhigyanpatwari /

      GitNexus  

    
      GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
summary: GitNexus 是一个完全在浏览器中运行的零服务器代码智能引擎，通过导入 GitHub 仓库或 ZIP 文件即可生成交互式知识图谱并内置图检索增强生成（Graph RAG）智能体，因其无需后端部署、保护代码隐私且能高效探索复杂代码库而值得关注。

name: typescript-go
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      typescript-go  

    
      Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript
summary: 该项目是微软官方用Go语言重写TypeScript编译器的实验性仓库，值得关注因为它可能大幅提升TypeScript的编译速度和性能。

name: hackingtool
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Z4nzu /

      hackingtool  

    
      ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
summary: 该项目是一个集成了多种黑客工具的“全家桶”，方便渗透测试和安全研究。它因工具全面、一键安装且持续更新而受到关注。
